text.style: text-transform: none; font-family: "Font Awesome 6 Pro"; letter-spacing: normal; font-style: normal; font-weight: 400; white-space: pre; font-size: 16px; text-decoration: none; direction: ltr; fill: rgb(39, 171, 205); fill-opacity: 1;

rect.style: fill: none; stroke-width: 2; stroke: rgb(39, 171, 205); stroke-opacity: 1;
